title: Interstellar Journeys
description: A pack about the journeys through the stars
body:
My fourth modpack, now on Modrinth!

This modpack is made to provide a mix of a kitchen-sink style experience with some careful changes and considerations to encourage experience all that the mods have to offer instead of the way you can often skip through major progression points. I try to follow semver in the sense that every major version number change is a whole new modpack from scratch with the same goal: having fun getting to space! This is the only constant that I seek to provide, sometimes there will be magic, sometimes not, but there will always be machinery and things to automate.
